prompt_preview:
You are a medical symptom normalization specialist. Your role is to extract and standardize medical symptoms from patient descriptions.

IMPORTANT: This is for MEDICAL EDUCATION only, not for clinical

primary_symptoms.name: Abdominal pain
primary_symptoms.raw_text: severe pain in my upper right abdomen

secondary_symptoms.name: Radiating pain
secondary_symptoms.raw_text: sometimes radiates to my right shoulder

ambiguous_signals.reason: unclear if pain is exclusively triggered by fatty meals
ambiguous_signals.clarification_needed: Does the pain occur after eating other types of meals as well?

response.summary: Patient presents with severe episodic upper right abdominal pain radiating to the right shoulder, accompanied by nausea and bloating, potentially triggered by fatty meals.
